text: Kicking off the final consultation stretch. Advisory traffic here so we do not lose signal in outlook.
Rachel corridor extension. Advisory committee position is supportive on the northern segment. Concerns remain at the intersection with Saint Denis around bus stop realignment.
Noted. Rachel corridor stays in scope. Rachel intersection with Saint Denis will get its own paragraph in the brief.

Field walk today on Saint Laurent north. Bengali speaking parent group told me they never received the survey link. This matches the Parc Extension outreach pattern I flagged earlier. Plateau team should check whether Saint Laurent north shows the same drop.
Confirming. I heard the same from two families near the corner. Delivery logs would show it.
Pulling the delivery cut by language for Saint Laurent north. Will share numbers privately before publishing anything.
Advisory recommendation for Mont Royal transit stop. Maintain the outbound stop position and add a pedestrian refuge at the west corner.
Adding to the brief.
Meeting request in for ACSDP tomorrow morning. Will try to get a clean read on the parking loss position before the councillor briefing.
Good. Delivery window language on Saint Denis is where I want to stay careful.
Reminder that any Ouellet facing communication passes through Ruth first.
Understood. Nothing goes out to David until I clear it.
Saint Laurent north delivery cut. Bengali cohort delivered rate below fifty percent for August through early September. That is a real reach gap not an artifact.
Consistent with what I heard from the parent group. Do we hold reach claims until we can quantify.
Yes we hold. Methodology v3 caveat covers this. Under sixty per cohort conclusion stays open.
Alliance Cycliste board is comfortable with the Rachel extension timeline. We are on record supportive.
Reactions

Update from ACSDP meeting this morning. Association is moving from opposed to conditional support if morning and late afternoon delivery windows are preserved on the Saint Denis segment. Named this clearly to the executive.
A couple of the smaller merchants are still nervous. Do not push the language on their behalf until I confirm one more time with the association.

Received. This is a real shift. Association des commercants Saint Denis Plateau moved to conditional support if delivery windows are preserved on Saint Denis. I will reflect it in the outreach plan and hold the phrasing until you confirm.
Good work Sophie. Ruth please make sure the councillor briefing carries the delivery window framing when Sophie signs off.
Noted. Updating stakeholder tracker.
Reminder my role is advisory only until October 15. Happy to be quoted in room but not before.
Same. Ok to quote me in room after final confirmation. Not before.
Adding both notes to the briefing.
Portal engagement snapshot for October 6. Saint Laurent north funnel drop off in Bengali and Urdu is visible on page 2. Sending the PDF to the group.
Read it. Confirms the field read.
Rachel corridor extension has a small group of residents worried about tree canopy. Not blocking. Want to see the framing in the room.
Tree canopy will get a paragraph. It is a real concern in the response body too.
Saint Joseph pilot. Reminder it is out of scope for final consultation per methodology v3. Not raising in the room.
Right. Out of scope. Deferred to feasibility. Noted for the record.
Halifax ICU travel window October 8 through 10. Briefing note to me before you board.
Yes. Briefing draft coming to you by end of October 7.
Community meeting sign in totals for the final push are in the shared folder.
Signed off on the advisory letter. Attaching soon.
Sending outreach reminders to the under reached cohorts today. Twilio SMS route only for now given the mailgun bounce cluster.
Good. Portal reminders through email will not land for those families.
Thanks all. Anchor is October 15. Keep this channel tight.
